checks.detail: linearizable_read returns local replica value without leadership check
Answer uses an epoch fence never mentioned in the question

findings.finding: Read path never verifies the caller is the current leader
findings.fix: Reject or redirect non-leader reads; only the leader may serve linearizable_read

findings.finding: Reference relies on an epoch fence the brief never requires
findings.fix: Either state the epoch-fence requirement in a numbered task or remove it from the answer

feedbackForEditor: 1) Make linearizable_read leadership-aware in the answer. 2) Either document the epoch fence in the numbered tasks or drop it from the reference so question and answer match.
